methodology.description: Automated extraction of key findings from paper abstracts using regex patterns

patterns_used.results: Numerical achievements, scores, improvements (e.g., "achieves X%", "accuracy of Y")
patterns_used.claims: Research findings stated with confidence (e.g., "we show that", "our results demonstrate")
patterns_used.methods: Novel approaches, frameworks, techniques (e.g., "we propose X", "we introduce Y")
